title: PhysioSkeptic Patch Report
description: Structured beat-level summary from the PhysioPatch encoder (paper §3.2). Contains SQI, per-beat confidence vector, HR, RR variability, P-wave ratio, LF/HF, and cross-modal consistency cues. Raw ECG/PPG waveforms are never included.

fs.description: Sampling frequency in Hz (125 Hz per paper).

duration_sec.description: Signal duration in seconds (30 s per paper).

q_hat.description: Scalar SQI estimate q̂ ∈ [0,1] from the SQI head (Eq. 2). Used for FAST/DEEP routing.

beat_confidences.description: Per-beat confidence vector c ∈ [0,1]^N (paper §3.2). Length equals the number of detected beats N.

hr_ecg.description: Heart rate estimated from ECG R-peaks in bpm.

hr_ppg.description: Heart rate estimated from PPG systolic onsets in bpm.

rr_cv.description: RR-interval coefficient of variation (std / mean). Values > 0.10 indicate irregular rhythm.

p_wave_ratio.description: Fraction of beats with detectable P-wave energy (sinus-origin proxy).

lf_hf.description: PPG spectral LF/HF power ratio (autonomic balance indicator, 0.04–0.15 Hz / 0.15–0.40 Hz).

low_confidence_beats.description: Beats where c_i < 0.40, reported with beat index, time window, and attention weight.

beat_index.description: Zero-based index into the beat_confidences array.

time_window_sec.description: [start_sec, end_sec] of the beat patch in signal time.

cross_signal_consistency.description: Cross-modal consistency flags between ECG and PPG evidence.

hr_diff_bpm.description: Absolute HR difference between ECG and PPG estimates in bpm.

rhythm_morphology_conflict.description: True when rr_cv > 0.10 AND p_wave_ratio < 0.85 (irregular with weak sinus support).

confidence_quality_mismatch.description: True when mean beat confidence > 0.80 but q̂ < 0.50.

patch_descriptors.description: Natural-language qualitative cues derived from numeric fields for LLM prompts.
